markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX manager and align on project status and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Manager:** Bailey Seybolt is the new GrowthX Engagement Manager, owning strategy and reporting while coordinating content production.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**CVE Project Unblocked:** The code freeze lifts today (Dec 10, PST), unblocking Phase 2 CVE publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [**Content Cadence Set:** Editorial articles will shift to 4/week to maintain quality on long-form content (\>3,000 words) while also publishing CVEs.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift Proposed:** GrowthX proposed exploring high-intent, long-tail keywords to capture lower-funnel traffic, a shift from the current top-of-funnel strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

## Topics

### New Engagement Manager

  - [Bailey Seybolt is the new GrowthX Engagement Manager, replacing Katia.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Role:** Owns strategy, goals, and reporting. Coordinates content execution and pulls in expert support (e.g., technical SEO).](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### CVE Database Project

  - [**Blocker:** Phase 2 publishing is on hold pending the code freeze lift.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Status:** The freeze lifts today (Dec 10, PST).](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [**Action:** Ankit will confirm the lift in Slack, unblocking Marcus to prepare the next CVE list.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Documentation:** Marcus will create a process diagram for internal records.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Content Strategy & Cadence

  - [**Cadence Adjustment:** Editorial articles will shift from 5/week to 4/week.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Maintain quality on long-form content (\>3,000 words) while also publishing CVEs.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Strategic Proposal:** GrowthX proposed exploring high-intent, long-tail keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture lower-funnel traffic and improve AEO/LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Current Strategy:** Focus on high-volume keywords for top-of-funnel traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Decision:** SentinelOne is open to exploring this further in January.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Operations & Reporting

  - [**Reporting Cadence:** Monthly deep-dive reports are confirmed. Weekly meetings will continue through January due to the high volume of CVE publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** No meetings or production Dec 25–Jan 1.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**SentinelOne:** Holidays on Dec 24 & 31.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Decision:** All meetings on Dec 24 & 31 are canceled.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Content Approvals:** \~15 new article topics are in Airtable for approval to ensure a smooth production pipeline through early January.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Workflow:** SentinelOne will continue notifying GrowthX via Slack when content is published, and GrowthX will update Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Prompt Engineering Project

  - [**Status:** Mansi is awaiting a revised scope from Yael and Joe.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**ETA:** Next week.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ankit:** Confirm code freeze lift in Slack (Dec 11).](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Marcus:** Create CVE publishing process diagram.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**SentinelOne Team:** Review and approve new article topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Mansi:** Provide Prompt Engineering project update (next week).](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Deliver 5 new articles and 5 revised articles via Slack (Dec 11).](https://fathom.video/share/mFFD6H-MX5sEz5CimijANyPjh1KqUcNv?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
